question: Does Northbeam hold a current SOC 2 Type II report?

sources.title: Northbeam SOC 2 Type II Report (FY2022, SUPERSEDED)
sources.text: This SOC 2 Type II examination covers the period from January 1 to December 31, 2022.

sources.title: Northbeam SOC 2 Type II Report (current, FY2024)
sources.text: This SOC 2 Type II examination covers the period from January 1 to December 31, 2024.

mock.claim: Northbeam maintains a current SOC 2 Type II report.
mock.output: Northbeam maintains a current SOC 2 Type II report [S1].

expected: The current report is the FY2024 examination (S2); the citation points to S1, the superseded FY2022 report, which does not support a 'current' claim.
why: A real source is cited (S1) but it is the retired FY2022 report; the current examination (FY2024) lives in the uncited S2, so the citation is stale and wrong.
